'''''Vulture''''' was a [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]] in use by an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] pirate group. Accompanied by an escort of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] and [[Toscan 8-Q starfighter|Toscan fighters]], named [[Pirate Squadron|Pirate]] and [[Fury Squadron|Fury]] respectively, ''Vulture'' led an attack on noted entrepreneur [[Dunari]] aboard his pleasure yacht, the ''[[Raw Deal]]''. The attack was defeated, however, due to the fact that Dunari was defended by a [[Bandit Squadron|covert]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] squadron that easily repelled the raiders.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
